query:
SELECT sl.digestType, sl.weekKey, sl.status, sl.createdAt
FROM digestScheduleLog sl
WHERE sl.weekKey IN ('2026W20', '2026W19')
ORDER BY sl.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
